abilities.name: Witchglass Choir
abilities.text: Signal tests in tuned sectors draw on your private relay chorus and read cleaner than they should.

abilities.name: Route Burn
abilities.text: After you map a lane, leave behind a note that other operatives can use as a safer approach.

abilities.name: Hush Static
abilities.text: The first anomaly you confront each round loses some of its edge as you drown it in controlled noise.

abilities.name: Choir Lash
abilities.text: When the breach surges, you can answer with a signal spike that keeps the lane from breaking all at once.
